reference: After a chest X-ray, my doctor told me I have a heterogeneous opacity in the right middle lobe. I am not sure what that means and what it is. I am not sick, but he is treating me with Ciprofloxacin and wants a follow-up X-ray in thirty days. What causes this and is it serious? I am sixty-eight years old.
text: After we prepped that tray, I was also told we all have a history of being in capacity in the right middle row. I am not sure what that means, and what it is. I am not sure, but I do assume you used triple phosphorus and went to follow-up after in 30 days. But causes this, and you'll be curious. I am 68 years old.
